name: Warbird Pro V9 Entry Filter
default_study_name: Warbird Pro V9 MES 5m Entry Filter Optimization
output_budget: 53/64 output-consuming calls (51 plot + 2 alertcondition); 9 request.security; 1 request.footprint (pine-lint counting)
notes: V9 entry-filter HPO. MES 5m only, Databento historical only. Treats Pine V9 ml_entry_long_trigger / ml_entry_short_trigger as candidates and tunes a post-trigger filter. 2026-05-09: pattern set trimmed to 4 (RisingWindow + BearEngulf/MarubozuBlack/TweezerTop). Phantom params removed: useMaGate, requirePositiveDeltaLong, requireNegativeDeltaShort, blockOnExhaustionLong/Short, minNetDelta20Long, maxNetDelta20Short. MA lengths now tunable (SMA 30-70, EMA 14-34). Negative-fib stop candidates banned by contract.

name: Warbird Pro V9 Exit Modeling
default_study_name: Warbird Pro V9 MES 5m ATR Risk Exit Modeling
output_budget: 53/64 output-consuming calls (51 plot + 2 alertcondition); 9 request.security; 1 request.footprint (pine-lint counting)
notes: V9 exit-policy HPO. MES 5m only, Databento historical only. Models ATR/risk exits on the same Pine V9 entry triggers. Negative-fib extension stops banned. 2026-05-09: pattern set trimmed to 4. MA setup remains frozen in this exit lane. Pine source frozen until promotion approval.

name: Warbird Pro V9 Core AutoGluon Training
output_budget: 53/64 output-consuming calls (51 plot + 2 alertcondition); 9 request.security; 1 request.footprint (pine-lint counting)
notes: Single Core training card supersedes the deprecated Hybrid+ 4-card chain (warbird_pro_v9_exit_cpcv, warbird_pro_v9_entry_filter_cpcv, warbird_pro_v9_ag_meta_cpcv, warbird_pro_v9_joint_challenger removed 2026-05-09). Binary classifier on V9 ml_* feature surface + ETL CVD divergence + microstructure + IB + HVN/LVN + UTC-anchored events. Triple-barrier label: +10pts before -5pts within 24 5m bars (2h, 2:1 R:R), drop neither-hit rows. Best_quality preset with explicit no-bag/no-stack overrides keeps it time-series safe. Hard gate enforced via scripts/ag/train_hard_gate.py.

name: Warbird Nexus Machine Learning RSI
default_study_name: Warbird Nexus ML Fast 5m Signal Quality 2026-04-27 ACTIVE
notes: Nexus footprint lane. Optimizes Nexus indicator settings only from manifest-backed TradingView/Pine request.footprint() snapshots containing nexus_fp_available, nexus_fp_bar_delta, and nexus_fp_total_volume. CSV exports, local OHLCV parquet, and synthetic body/wick delta are invalid for this lane.
